sanskrit: निर्मानमोहा जितसङ्गदोषा अध्यात्मनित्याः विनिवृत्तकामाः। द्वन्द्वैर्विमुक्ताः सुखदुःखसंज्ञैः गच्छन्त्यमूढाः पदमव्ययं तत्॥
transliteration: nirmāna-mohā jita-saṅga-doṣā adhyātma-nityāḥ vinivṛtta-kāmāḥ | dvandvair vimuktāḥ sukha-duḥkha-saṃjñaiḥ gacchanty amūḍhāḥ padam avyayam tat ||
literal_meaning: Free from pride-and-illusion, having conquered faulty attachments, ever-rooted in the Self, with desires fully withdrawn, liberated from the pairs-of-opposites called pleasure-and-pain, the undeluded reach that imperishable state.
contextual_meaning: The psyche that has metabolized narcissism, codependency, and hedonic oscillation stabilizes in a non-reactive, self-transcendent mode and gains access to an enduring, non-fragmented identity.
psychological_state: Post-egoic integration: defenses are relaxed, affect regulation is internalized, and the self is anchored in a transpersonal center.
trigger_scenario: After a painful breakup you finally stop checking your ex's social media, quit chasing status at work, and notice you can feel sadness without being consumed by it—your mind feels spacious and quietly steady.
anchor_text: Drop ego, craving, and mood swings; rest as the unbroken Self.
